meta.title: Ethiopia Job Portal
meta.description: Find jobs and hire talent across Ethiopia — ETB salaries, Amharic support, mobile-first.

home.hero: Build your career or your team — built for Ethiopia
home.sub: Search roles in Addis Ababa and nationwide. Salaries in Ethiopian Birr (ETB). Job alerts by email or SMS.
home.demoSub: Use these accounts to explore the full portal — profile, applications, employer analytics, and Amharic-ready job posts.

jobs.title: Open positions
jobs.loginToApply: Sign in as a job seeker to apply.
jobs.employerCannotApply: Employers cannot apply to jobs. Switch to a seeker account.

footer.note: Times shown in Africa/Addis_Ababa (UTC+3). Premium listings support Chapa & Telebirr.
footer.tagline: Ethiopia's mobile-first job marketplace — ETB salaries, bilingual posts, smart matching.

auth.signInSub: Access your dashboard, applications, and saved alerts.

dashboard.selectJob: Select a job to view applicants
